BatchConversionToPayAsYouGo.action: The action to perform on instances; current valid value: toPostpay
BatchConversionToPayAsYouGo.config: Configuration for batch conversion to pay-as-you-go instances; supports up to 20 entries
BatchConversionToPayAsYouGo.config.cdsList: (Deprecated. Subscription CDS data disks attached to BCC must be converted to pay-as-you-go together.) List of associated data disks to convert; defaults to empty; "all" indicates all associated data disks (e.g., "cdsList":["all"]); pass specific disk IDs to convert only selected disks
BatchConversionToPayAsYouGo.config.effectiveType: Effective timing for the conversion; valid values: AtOnce (convert immediately), AfterExpiration (convert after expiration); defaults to AfterExpiration if not specified; all instances in a batch operation must use the same value
